# Cafepedia

> Vertical search engine for cafes and places in Indonesia. "Where should we go? Check Cafepedia."

Cafepedia is the most comprehensive cafe discovery platform in Indonesia. We index 5,000+ places in Bandung across 17 categories with real data: vibe tags, photos, opening hours, Instagram handles, ratings, and more.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://cafepedia.id): Search cafes by name, vibe, or area. AI-powered "Pick for me" recommendations.
- [Cafe Bandung](https://cafepedia.id/cafe-bandung): Complete guide to cafes in Bandung — top picks, categories, areas, FAQ.
- [Explore Bandung](https://cafepedia.id/browse): Browse 17 categories — cafe, rooftop, bar, bakery, coworking, restaurant, and more.
- [Blog](https://cafepedia.id/blog): Curated guides — best cafes for working, aesthetic spots, area guides.
- [About](https://cafepedia.id/about): Our mission and methodology.

## What Cafepedia Offers

- **Search by vibe**: "quiet cafe to work", "aesthetic rooftop", "pet-friendly brunch spot"
- **Search by area**: Dago, Braga, Pasir Kaliki, Buah Batu, and 15+ neighborhoods
- **AI recommendations**: Describe what you want, get the top 3 perfect matches with explanations
- **Real data**: Ratings, reviews, hours, phone, Instagram, Google Maps links — verified and updated
- **17 categories**: Cafe, restaurant, rooftop, bar, lounge, coworking, bakery, brunch, dessert, tea house, late night, live music, billiard, game room, karaoke, pet cafe, bookstore cafe

## Data

- 5,000+ places indexed (Bandung: 4,297 | Jakarta: 874)
- Vibe tags generated from real reviews and place attributes
- Photos sourced from Google Places (HD, up to 4000px)
- Data refreshed automatically via weekly sync

## Languages

- **Default**: Bahasa Indonesia
- **Also available**: English (toggle on site)

## API

- Search endpoint: `https://api.cafepedia.id/search?q={query}`
- Single place: `https://api.cafepedia.id/cafe/{id}`

## Contact

- Website: https://cafepedia.id
- Email: hello@cafepedia.id
